creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Pedro,

pfgshield-freebsd@yahoo.com, 06.10.07, 16:41h CEST:

> (I forgot to CC Stefan on the followup, also Maho might have changed opinion)
> 
> Hello;
> 
> FWIW, along with the SuiteSparse maintainer we wanted to keep this port for two
> reasons:
> 
> - SuiteSparse has a restrictive license.

I wasn't aware that there was a different license for the whole package.

> - Some people (and I recall some ports too) prefer to use the slimmer umfpack
> and not the bigger package.

There is only one port making use of math/umfpack: math/freemat. And with
that one, it's only used if it's already installed.

If there is still interest in this port, I can remove the EXPIRATION_DATE
tag, of course. However, it would be nice if someone (you? maho?) took
maintainership for this port, then.

Regards,
Stefan
